global_description: A small, slender songbird with a streamlined body, predominantly brownish-gray plumage, and a white underbelly. It features a thin, pointed bill and long legs. The wings and tail are streaked with darker shades, providing a subtle contrast.

part_details.bill: Thin, pointed, and slightly curved, suitable for foraging.
part_details.plumage: Brownish-gray with subtle streaks, providing camouflage.
part_details.underbelly: White, contrasting with the darker upper parts.
part_details.wings: Long, with darker streaks along the feathers.
part_details.tail: Medium length, with streaks and a slightly forked shape.

spatial_relations: The thin bill is positioned at the front of the head.
The long legs extend downward from the body.
The wings are attached to the sides of the body, extending outward.
The tail extends from the rear of the body, slightly forked.
